name: Wheatable Snack Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the popped popcorn, pretzel sticks, and peanuts in a large bowl.
2. Drizzle the melted margarine over the mixture.
3. Stir in the wheat snack crackers.
4. Sprinkle with onion salt and garlic salt.
5. Toss until everything is evenly coated.
6. Store the mix in an airtight container.
7. Makes 10 cups.
